## We Say

Gyeon Q2 PPF EVO offers you all the benefits of a ceramic coating, whilst maintaining the self healing and flexibility of PPF, making for the ultimate protection for your PPF wrapped car. Q2 PPF will also work well on vinyl wrap and won't change the appearance so is suitable for matte and gloss finishes.

## Key Features

Beading*8*/10(Compared To Others)

Durability*24* Months(Average Value)

Slickness*8*/10(Compared To Others)

## Description

Gyeon Q2 PPF EVO is a dedicated coating for Vinyl Wrap and Paint Protection Film (PPF). Q2 PPF EVO offers all the benefits of a coating such as hardness, chemical resistance and incredible water beading, whilst maintaining the flexibility and self healing abilites of the PPF.

Gyeon Q2 PPF EVO will offer 24 months of slick, hard wearing protection that repels water and dirt with ease. Q2 PPF EVO doesn't change the appearance, so is suitable for use on both gloss and matte finishes.

## How To Use

Gyeon Q2 PPF EVO must be applied like a regular coating with criss-cross motion. Ensure good preparation of the paint protection film using [Q2M PPF RENEW](/products/gyeon-q2m-ppf-renew) follow by [Q2M PREP](/products/gyeon-q2m-prep) for optimal surface bonding.TIP: Work with reflected light. It will make streaks or smudges more visible and help eliminate them in time. Use the Q2M Suede to perfect the finish.
